1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in Kristiansand filtered by kommunenummer

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons (stormflo200ar_klimaarna) for later spatial filtering

4.description: reduce storm-surge polygons to Kristiansand extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (count of intersecting storm polygons)
